intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering workflow. Let me start with a plan.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

input.title: Process Patient 145 Day 0 (GSM5746259) with scanpy
input.summary: QC → normalize → HVG → PCA → UMAP → Leiden clustering → marker genes
input.rationale: Generate a complete snapshot of cell states, clusters, and cluster-specific gene expression for the single timepoint.
input.assumptions:
- Use the first sample (Patient_145_Day0) from the registered dataset
- Standard filtering: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial fraction < 20%
- Normalization: 10,000 counts per cell + log transform
- Leiden clustering with default resolution (≈0.5)
- Marker genes identified by rank_genes_groups (log2FC)
- Plots: QC histograms, HVG + PCA variance, UMAP by cluster, top cluster markers

steps.title: Load the first sample
steps.description: Extract Patient_145_Day0 from the registered dataset
expected_outputs: Loaded AnnData object with 7,532 cells × 36,601 genes

steps.title: Filter cells
steps.description: Remove low-quality cells: n_genes < 200 or pct_mito ≥ 20%

steps.title: PCA & UMAP
steps.description: 50 PCs, then UMAP on PC space

steps.title: Leiden clustering
steps.description: Cluster on UMAP neighbors, default resolution

steps.title: Find cluster marker genes
steps.description: Wilcoxon rank-sum test, top 10 per cluster
